## ✨ Feature Request

**Deerflow Agent Framework** — Feature Request

> We love new ideas! Please describe the feature you'd like to see.

---

### 🎯 Problem Statement

*What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?*

*If this is related to a specific pain point with AI agents, describe the scenario:*

---

### 💡 Proposed Solution

*Describe your proposed solution in detail:*

---

### 📐 Design & Architecture

*If applicable, describe how this would fit into the Deerflow architecture:*

- **Which module(s) would it affect?**
  - [ ] `rules/` — New or modified rule
  - [ ] `core/` — Core engine change
  - [ ] `algorithms/` — New or modified algorithm
  - [ ] `workflows/` — Workflow modification
  - [ ] `skills/` — New or modified skill
  - [ ] `mcp/` — MCP integration change
  - [ ] `scripts/` — Setup/automation change
  - [ ] Configuration / YAML changes
  - [ ] Documentation only

- **Would this require breaking changes?**
  - [ ] Yes — Describe impact:
  - [ ] No

### 📈 Priority & Impact

| Criterion | Rating |
|---|---|
| **Urgency** | [ ] Low [ ] Medium [ ] High [ ] Critical |
| **Impact** | [ ] Small [ ] Medium [ ] Large [ ] Transformative |

### ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem this feature solves
- [ ] I have provided a proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing users
- [ ] I am willing to submit a PR to implement this (optional)
- [ ] I am willing to help test this feature (optional)
